title: Quran, Sura 17: Al-Isra
description: Sura 17 (Al-Isra: The Night Journey) from the Holy Quran.
introduction: Sura 17 (Al-Isra: The Night Journey) from the Holy Quran.

translation.text: Exalted is He who took His Servant by night from the Sacred Mosque to the Farthest Mosque, whose surroundings We have blessed, to show him of Our signs.
